src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the Generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Add import for CRLFLogConverter to support safe logging markers.
Use Java 13+ text blocks for multi-line log message formatting.
Handle empty active profiles by falling back to default profiles in log output.
Add JHipster generator needle comments to the ApplicationProperties class to allow the code generator to inject custom properties.
Add a Spring profile condition to exclude the AsyncConfiguration bean from loading during specific test profiles.
Wrap single string argument in an array for @EnableJpaRepositories annotation.
Remove the Zalando Problem Jackson modules as they are no longer required or compatible with the current dependency set.
Reorder method parameters to place the custom @LiquibaseDataSource ObjectProvider after LiquibaseProperties.
Update static resource location to use the root static directory instead of a subdirectory.
Refactor resource path patterns to use file extensions and broader matching instead of directory-based paths.
Use pattern matching for instanceof to simplify casting.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before:
if (server instanceof ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory) {
            ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory servletWebServer = (ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory) server;

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Simplify URL decoding by using StandardCharsets.UTF_8 directly instead of catching UnsupportedEncodingException.
Update CORS configuration to support allowedOriginPatterns and modern Swagger UI paths.
